# WebAct

> WebAct is a website design, development, SEO, digital advertising, and digital marketing agency serving businesses throughout the United States.

## Primary website

- https://www.webact.com/

## Core services

- [Website Design](https://www.webact.com/design/)
- [Website Development](https://www.webact.com/design/web-design/)
- [Search Engine Optimization](https://www.webact.com/marketing/seo/)
- [Local SEO](https://www.webact.com/local-seo/)
- [Digital Marketing](https://www.webact.com/digital-marketing/)
- [Google Ads Management](https://www.webact.com/digital-ads/google-search-advertising/)
- [Social Media Advertising](https://www.webact.com/social-media-advertising/)
- [Graphic Design](https://www.webact.com/graphic-design/)
- [Duda Development](https://www.webact.com/duda-development/)
- [Duda Widgets](https://www.webact.com/duda-widgets/)

- [About WebAct](https://www.webact.com/about-webact/)

## Usage guidance

Public WebAct pages may be summarized, indexed, and cited by search engines and AI systems. Cite the relevant original WebAct URL when referring to its services, company information, portfolio, articles, or documentation.

## Preferred attribution

WebAct  
https://www.webact.com/
